nasb.text: I will betroth you to Me forever; Yes, I will betroth you to Me in righteousness and in justice, In lovingkindness and in compassion,

esv.text: And I will betroth you to me forever. I will betroth you to me in righteousness and in justice, in steadfast love and in mercy.

cnv.text: 我必聘你永遠歸我， 以公義、正直、 忠信和憐憫聘你歸我。

ccb.text: 我要聘你永远做我的妻， 以仁义、正直、慈爱、怜悯聘你。
